reviews.comment:
Cuando hay viaje laaaargo, bueno para una parada, estirar las piernas y un buen café para seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
When there's a loooong journey, it's good to stop, stretch your legs and have a good coffee to continue the journey.

reviews.comment:
Una lastima q todos los sandwiches sean envasados. Salvo las hamburguesas no preparan nada en el momento. Tiene buen servicio pero hay q estar atento al descuento de socio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame all the sandwiches are pre-packaged. Except for the hamburgers, they don't prepare anything fresh. The service is good, but you have to keep an eye out for the member discount.

reviews.comment:
Horrible! Me confundí de YPF. Era la que (yendo para capital) estaba más adelante la que quería ir. La full. Está es un asco la comida. Tardás media hora en comprar y esta todo frío e insulso lo que te dan. No voy más

(Translated by Google)
Horrible! I went to the wrong YPF station. I meant the one further down the road (going towards the city). The full-service one. The food here is awful. It takes half an hour to buy gas, and everything they give you is cold and bland. I'm never going back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtNDY2ZE13EAE

reviews.comment:
Preciosa estación de Servicio, ideal para hacer una parada justo a mitad de camino si vas o volves de Mar del Plata. Su ubicación, zona de Servicio y los parques que l rodean la hacen un lugar ideal para un buen descanso.

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful service station, ideal for a stopover halfway to or from Mar del Plata. Its location, service area, and surrounding parks make it an ideal place for a relaxing break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdmZmNVNnEAE
